name: Dr. Mara Voss

pol_coal_subsidies.flavor: Burying coal ash in our children's future is not an energy policy.

pol_military_expansion.flavor: Every cannon forged is a forest that will not be planted.

pol_civil_liberties_act.flavor: A free people are far more likely to protect what they love — including the land.

flavourText: Progress that poisons the soil is no progress at all.

name: General Rask

pol_coal_subsidies.flavor: Domestic fuel keeps the war machine turning when supply lines fail.

pol_military_expansion.flavor: Hesitation on the border is an invitation written in blood.

pol_civil_liberties_act.flavor: Freedoms are luxuries that vanish the moment the enemy arrives at the gate.

flavourText: A border that can't be defended isn't a border — it's an invitation.

name: Director Chen

pol_coal_subsidies.flavor: Coal is an inefficient baseline; the numbers consistently favor diversification.

pol_military_expansion.flavor: Projection of force has measurable deterrence value when calibrated correctly.

pol_civil_liberties_act.flavor: Protected civil discourse tends to produce more accurate and actionable civic data.

flavourText: Every problem has an optimal solution. Finding it is just a matter of data.

name: Sister Calinda

pol_coal_subsidies.flavor: It's the miners' lungs that pay the real subsidy — not the shareholders'.

pol_military_expansion.flavor: The common soldier's family does not share in the general's glory.

pol_civil_liberties_act.flavor: Rights aren't privileges handed down from above — they belong to every person who breathes.

flavourText: The people don't need to be managed. They need to be heard.

name: Montgomery Gould

pol_coal_subsidies.flavor: Coal built this civilization; withdrawing its support now is the height of ingratitude.

pol_military_expansion.flavor: Secure borders are good for business — the tariff lines practically write themselves.

pol_civil_liberties_act.flavor: Too much freedom in the streets means not enough order where it counts.

flavourText: Tears make excellent lubricant for the textile looms.
